_comment: Single source of truth for the /integrations page list AND the IntegrationsGrid hero card. §188 — list rewritten to the 33 canonical Rapid Hire Solutions partners from the customer-provided integrations screenshots. Categories: ATS (talent-acquisition / applicant-tracking platforms), HRIS (full HCM suites), Payroll (payroll / workforce-management). The legacy CRM bucket is now empty by design; the page-level CATS filter has been narrowed accordingly so it never offers a chip with zero matches.

items.name: CATS
items.body: Trigger background checks from CATS pipeline stages; report PDFs write back to the candidate file.

items.name: Essium Labs
items.body: Digital onboarding + I-9 paired with pre-hire screening so the candidate finishes one flow.

items.name: iCIMS
items.body: Marketplace integration with full bi-directional status + report sync from the iCIMS profile.

items.name: Paycor
items.body: Pre-hire screening rolls into Paycor onboarding and payroll setup at offer acceptance.

items.name: ADP RM
items.body: ADP Recruitment Management — order packages from ADP RM and sync results into the new-hire record.

items.name: Tenstreet
items.body: Driver-focused ATS for transportation; MVRs, CDLIS, and PSP fire from the Tenstreet workflow.

items.name: CareerBuilder
items.body: Talent acquisition platform; trigger checks from candidate stages and write outcomes back.

items.name: IBM Kenexa BrassRing
items.body: Enterprise BrassRing requisition workflow with native order + adjudication write-back.

items.name: myStaffingPro (Paychex)
items.body: Paychex myStaffingPro — order packages from the candidate record and sync results inline.

items.name: RecruiterBox
items.body: Lightweight ATS for SMBs; one-click background check at offer acceptance.

items.name: SilkRoad
items.body: SilkRoad Recruiting — kick off screening packages from requisition workflow stages.

items.name: SuccessFactors
items.body: SAP SuccessFactors — enterprise-grade integration for global hiring with localized packages.

items.name: Taleo Enterprise Edition
items.body: Oracle Taleo Enterprise — order from candidate selection workflows; PDF report attaches to file.

items.name: Workday
items.body: Pre-hire screening wired into Workday Recruiting and Onboarding business processes.

items.name: Cadient Talent
items.body: Hourly + retail hiring platform; trigger checks from Cadient assessment workflows.

items.name: ClearCompany
items.body: Talent management suite; auto-trigger packages on stage move with status sync back.

items.name: Cornerstone
items.body: Cornerstone Recruiting — fire screening packages from candidate stages and sync results.

items.name: Dayforce
items.body: Ceridian Dayforce — pre-hire screening rolls into Dayforce onboarding tasks and payroll setup.

items.name: Erecruit
items.body: Staffing-industry front + back office; bulk-order packages from a candidate tearsheet.

items.name: Greenhouse
items.body: Auto-trigger packages on stage move; report PDF attached to candidate profile.

items.name: Hirebridge
items.body: Mid-market ATS; pre-hire packages fire from the offer stage and sync status back inline.

items.name: JazzHR
items.body: Trigger checks at any pipeline stage and send candidate-facing forms from the candidate profile.

items.name: Jobvite
items.body: Talent acquisition suite; one-click order from the requisition with disclosures attached.

items.name: Lever
items.body: Two-way sync of background check status across requisition + offer stages.

items.name: PageUp
items.body: Global talent management platform; order packages from PageUp candidate workflows.

items.name: Rival
items.body: Rival (formerly SilkRoad Talent) — fire screening from candidate stages with full status sync.

items.name: SmartRecruiters
items.body: Talent acquisition + CRM; trigger background screening from candidate hiring stages.

items.name: talentReef
items.body: Hourly + service-industry ATS; native order + result write-back to the talentReef profile.

items.name: Taleo Business Edition
items.body: Oracle Taleo Business Edition — order packages from candidate workflows; results attach to the file.

items.name: UKG Pro
items.body: UKG Pro (Ultimate Kronos Group) HCM — trigger packages from new-hire workflows with full sync.

items.name: UKG Ready
items.body: UKG Ready HCM for SMB / mid-market — order from new-hire workflows with status write-back.

items.name: Workable
items.body: One-click background check from the candidate profile, with results returning in-app.

items.name: Oracle
items.body: Oracle HCM Cloud — pre-hire screening and adjudication wired into Oracle Recruiting Cloud.
